hero.body: We build secure VPN infrastructure, market-ready web apps, and mobile products. Fast. Beautiful. Built to last.

services.label: What We Build
services.body: We cover the full stack. Pixel-perfect interfaces to secure cloud infrastructure.
services.web_desc: Scalable React and TypeScript web platforms, from SaaS dashboards to marketing sites.
services.mobile_desc: Cross-platform iOS and Android apps built with Expo and React Native.
services.vpn_desc: WireGuard-based VPN infrastructure, zero-log architecture, and privacy-first systems.
services.backend_desc: Node.js REST APIs, PostgreSQL databases, and scalable cloud deployments.
services.design_desc: User-centered design systems, interactive prototypes, and brand identity.
services.devops_desc: Docker, Oracle Cloud, automated CI/CD, and 99.9% uptime infrastructure.

whyus.label: Why PerfectPS
whyus.body: We have built software products across industries, from fintech to security infrastructure. Here is what we bring to every engagement.
whyus.card1_desc: We run tight sprints with clear milestones. You always know what is being built, when it ships, and what comes next. No surprises.
whyus.card2_desc: Every product we build starts with threat modeling. From zero-log VPN infrastructure to encrypted APIs, security is architecture, not an afterthought.
whyus.card3_desc: We are not a factory. We invest in understanding your business and act as a technical co-founder, not just an agency on a contract.

process.label: How We Work
process.body: A proven 4-step process that keeps every project on track, on budget, and on time.
process.step1_desc: We start by understanding your business goals, users, and constraints. No jumping straight to code. A clear brief saves weeks of rework.
process.step2_desc: Architecture decisions, UI systems, and prototypes. We align on the plan before writing a single production line, so you can see it before we build it.
process.step3_desc: Iterative development in tight sprints. Regular check-ins, live previews, and test coverage at every stage. No black-box development.
process.step4_desc: Production deploy, monitoring setup, and post-launch support. We do not hand you a zip file. We ship it, measure it, and stay on until it is stable.

work.label: Selected Work
work.page_body: A curated sample of products built across industries. All client identities are kept confidential under NDA.
work.portfolio_desc: A curated sample of products built across industries. Client identities are kept confidential under NDA.

techstack.label: Technology
techstack.body: Modern stack, battle-tested choices. Built for performance and long-term maintainability.

about.label: About the Studio
about.quote: We believe in clean code, beautiful interfaces, and infrastructure that actually works.
about.p1: PerfectPS is a digital studio based in the Middle East. We specialize in secure, high-performance digital products.
about.p2: We built PS Secure, a zero-log VPN platform trusted by users across the region. We partner with businesses to design, build, and ship products that make an impact.
about.p3: We believe in clean code, beautiful interfaces, and infrastructure that actually works.

products.label: Our Products
products.name: PS Secure
products.subtitle: VPN and Privacy Platform
products.desc: Enterprise-grade VPN powered by WireGuard. PS Secure delivers zero-log privacy, AdGuard DNS filtering, a hardware kill switch, and native iOS and Android apps. All under PerfectPS infrastructure.

pssecure.hero_body: Enterprise-grade WireGuard VPN. Zero logs. Lightning fast. Available on iOS and Android.
pssecure.f1_desc: The fastest and most modern VPN protocol. Significantly faster than OpenVPN or IPSec.
pssecure.f2_desc: We never store, sell, or share your data. No traffic logs, no connection logs, ever.
pssecure.f3_desc: Built-in ad and tracker blocking at the DNS level. Browse cleaner and faster.
pssecure.f4_desc: Automatically disconnects internet if the VPN drops. Your real IP is never exposed.
pssecure.f5_desc: iOS, Android, and desktop support from one account. All devices, one subscription.
pssecure.f6_desc: Optimized servers across the Middle East and beyond for low-latency connections.
pssecure.step1_desc: Available on iOS and Android. Free to download, instant setup.
pssecure.step2_desc: No configuration, no complexity. Tap once to connect to the best server.
pssecure.step3_desc: Full privacy, full speed. Your data is encrypted, your identity is protected.
pssecure.cta_body: Join the waitlist and be the first to get access.
pssecure.protocols_body: PS Secure automatically picks the best protocol. In restrictive regions it switches to stealth protocols that look like ordinary HTTPS — invisible to censorship systems.
pssecure.proto_wg_desc: The gold standard of modern VPN. Used by default for its unmatched speed and lean codebase.
pssecure.proto_amnezia_desc: WireGuard with obfuscation headers. Defeats deep-packet inspection without a speed penalty.
pssecure.proto_hysteria_desc: UDP-based protocol built for unstable and lossy networks. Excellent on mobile.
pssecure.proto_trojan_desc: Disguises VPN traffic as ordinary web traffic. Works in China, Iran, UAE, and Saudi Arabia.
pssecure.pricing_body: Start free. No credit card required. Upgrade to Pro for full access to all servers and protocols.
pssecure.servers_body: Strategically placed nodes across the Middle East, Europe, and Asia. Optimized for low latency from the region.
pssecure.security_nologs_desc: We are technically incapable of handing over your browsing data. We log nothing — no traffic, no DNS, no timestamps.
pssecure.security_open_desc: Every protocol we use — WireGuard, Hysteria2, Trojan — is publicly audited open-source software.
pssecure.security_encrypt_desc: Military-grade encryption on every byte that leaves your device. Unreadable to anyone in transit.
pssecure.download_body: Available on iOS and Android. Free to download with no credit card required.
pssecure.download_coming_soon: Coming soon to the App Store and Google Play
pssecure.features_page_body: Every feature in PS Secure was designed with one principle: your data is yours.
pssecure.feat_nologs_desc: No traffic logs, no DNS query logs, no connection timestamps. We cannot hand over what we do not have.
pssecure.feat_ks_desc: If the VPN connection drops unexpectedly, internet access is blocked immediately. Your real IP is never exposed.
pssecure.feat_dns_desc: All DNS queries route through AdGuard's servers, blocking ads, trackers, and malware domains at the network level.
pssecure.feat_aes_desc: The same encryption standard used by governments and banks. Protects every byte of your traffic.
pssecure.feat_speed_desc: WireGuard's lean 4000-line codebase delivers 2–3× the throughput of legacy VPN protocols.
pssecure.feat_auto_desc: The app benchmarks available protocols on each connection and picks the fastest one for your network.
pssecure.feat_lb_desc: Each location runs multiple nodes. Traffic is distributed to prevent congestion and keep latency low.
pssecure.feat_stealth_desc: Trojan and Hysteria2 protocols disguise VPN traffic as normal HTTPS. Undetectable by DPI systems.
pssecure.feat_auto_bypass_desc: When WireGuard is blocked, the app silently falls back to Trojan then VMess over WebSocket. Fully automatic.
pssecure.feat_region_desc: The app detects your country on startup and pre-selects the most reliable protocol for your network environment.
pssecure.feat_1tap_desc: No configuration. Tap once to connect, tap again to disconnect. The app handles everything else.
pssecure.feat_multidev_desc: Use PS Secure on your phone, tablet, and laptop simultaneously from a single Pro account.
pssecure.feat_reconnect_desc: If your connection drops — switching Wi-Fi, entering a tunnel — PS Secure reconnects automatically.
pssecure.feat_dark_desc: Native dark mode and full Arabic RTL support. Designed for the Middle East from day one.
pssecure.protocols_page_body: PS Secure uses a protocol waterfall — trying each layer in order until one connects. You stay online even in the most restricted networks.
pssecure.proto_detail_wg_body: WireGuard is PS Secure's default protocol for good reason: it is the fastest, leanest VPN protocol ever built. Its entire codebase is 4,000 lines — a fraction of OpenVPN's 70,000 — making it easy to audit, harder to exploit, and significantly faster in practice.
pssecure.proto_detail_wg_use: Best for: everyday use, streaming, gaming, any unrestricted network.
pssecure.proto_detail_amnezia_body: AmneziaWG wraps WireGuard packets in a layer of obfuscation that defeats deep-packet inspection (DPI). It looks like random noise to a firewall, not a VPN. You get WireGuard's speed without the fingerprint.
pssecure.proto_detail_amnezia_use: Best for: ISPs that block or throttle known VPN protocols.
pssecure.proto_detail_hysteria_body: Hysteria2 runs over QUIC (UDP) and is specifically engineered for high packet-loss environments. Where TCP-based VPNs stutter, Hysteria2 stays smooth. It is especially effective on mobile networks.
pssecure.proto_detail_hysteria_use: Best for: mobile networks, satellite internet, hotel Wi-Fi, high-latency connections.
pssecure.proto_detail_trojan_body: Trojan disguises VPN traffic as ordinary TLS 1.3 HTTPS traffic. To any network observer, it looks like you are visiting a regular website. There is no VPN fingerprint to detect. It is the deepest censorship-bypass layer in PS Secure.
pssecure.proto_detail_trojan_use: Best for: China, Iran, UAE, Saudi Arabia — any network with aggressive protocol blocking.
pssecure.proto_waterfall_body: When you tap Connect, PS Secure tries protocols in order: WireGuard → AmneziaWG → Hysteria2 → Trojan. The first one that connects wins. The whole process takes under 2 seconds. If a protocol is blocked on your network, you never notice — the app handles it silently.
pssecure.pricing_page_body: Start for free with no credit card. Upgrade to Pro to unlock every server, protocol, and device slot.
pssecure.pricing_faq_1_q: Can I try Pro before paying?
pssecure.pricing_faq_1_a: Yes. The free plan gives you full access to the app with 2 server locations. No credit card required.
pssecure.pricing_faq_2_q: What payment methods do you accept?
pssecure.pricing_faq_2_a: Visa, Mastercard, Mada (Saudi Arabia), Apple Pay, and Google Pay.
pssecure.pricing_faq_3_a: Yes. Cancel from your account settings or from the App Store / Google Play subscription page. No questions asked.
pssecure.pricing_faq_4_a: Yes. If you are not satisfied within 7 days of upgrading, contact us and we will refund you in full.
pssecure.pricing_faq_5_q: Does the free plan have ads?
pssecure.pricing_faq_5_a: No. PS Secure never shows ads, regardless of plan.
pssecure.pricing_no_card: No credit card required for free plan
pssecure.download_page_body: Available on iOS and Android. Start with the free plan — no credit card, no commitment.
pssecure.download_web_sub_desc: Prefer to pay on the web? Subscribe at perfectps.com to avoid App Store fees.

capabilities.label: Scale & Expertise
capabilities.body: Across web, mobile, and infrastructure. We do not list them all — we let the scale speak for itself.

footer.tagline: Building digital products that are fast, secure, and built to last.

contact.label: Let's Work Together
contact.body: Tell us about your idea and we will get back to you within 24 hours.
contact.success_body: We will get back to you within 24 hours.
contact.info_note: We typically respond within a few hours during business days.
